title: Evening Commute
description: Sardinia, just after dusk. Someone's boat, someone's lantern, and exactly the right moment of reflection.
longDescription:
It was the end of a day that deserved a quiet ending.

I walked down the beach alone, camera in hand the way it always is, not looking for anything in particular. Then I found this. A small wooden boat anchored in the bay, a gas lantern burning on the seat, nobody in it. Somewhere up the beach, I imagine its owner was at dinner, completely unbothered, living the kind of life where this is just how you get there.

I stood there longer than I needed to. The water was completely still. The rock formation held the last of the light. The lantern did the rest.

Some photographs you plan. Some just find you at the right moment on the right evening in the right place. This was one of those. The perfect moment of reflection, Sardinia, Italy.
tools: Sony a7rII & Sony FE 24-105mm f/4 G OSS
